name: Bagels Galore (Roasted Bell Peppers and Onions)
recipeIngredient: 2 1/2 Inch thick slices of red onion
If the onion is small, make that 4 pieces
(optional, I like it with and without)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the red bell pepper lengthwise into four wedges, remove any seeds or membrane, and place on a piece of aluminum foil in the toaster oven with the onions.
2. Preheat the toaster oven to 400°F (200°C). Bake for about 20 minutes, or until the bell pepper is soft and blistered.
3. Remove the peppers from the oven and place the bagel halves into the toaster oven. When done, remove the skins from the roasted peppers.
4. Arrange the toasted bagel halves on a plate open-faced.
5. Place two slices of onion on one half of each bagel.
6. Spread a small amount of cream cheese (if using) onto the remaining half and add 2 pieces of roasted bell pepper.
7. Sprinkle black pepper over the bell peppers.
8. Serve hot and enjoy immediately while still warm.
